channel.title: MCO — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on MCO (Moody's Corp) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED MCO (-25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed MCO in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED MCO (-23%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed MCO in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED MCO (-18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed MCO in Q4 2025 · 9.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chuck Akre)

item.title: William von Mueffling: ADDED MCO (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) added MCO in Q4 2025 · 6.4% of portfolio. Adding to Moody's.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (William von Mueffling)

item.title: Tom Slater: TRIMMED MCO (-7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed MCO in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED MCO (+4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added MCO in Q4 2025 · 22.4% of portfolio. Top conviction — adding to 15+ year Moody's position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Dev Kantesaria)
